original_image_tags: Back of a manila document folder or envelope, showing two hole-punches at the top center and a smaller staple or fastener mark between them. A rectangular, lighter-colored paper or adhesive residue strip is visible vertically down the center. Two blue ink stamps are present, both upside down relative to the folder orientation.

elements.description: Two blue ink stamps on a light-colored paper surface. The top stamp is oriented upside down and reads: 'RECEIVED / REC'D ESPIONAGE / FBI / U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE / APR 21 1 14 PM '49'. The bottom stamp is oriented right-side up and reads: 'RECEIVED / REC'D ESPIONAGE / FBI / U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE / APR 4 5 05 PM '49'. There are two punch holes at the top edge and faint red text at the bottom right corner.

judge.reason: Both agree on the presence of two blue ink stamps, two punch holes, and a light-colored surface, but Description B adds extensive quoted stamp text that Description A does not mention or contradict.
